title: Add URL to Markdown to writing
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Webpages, but readable
gist.blurb: The greenhouse just got a new tool: URL to Markdown. Feed it a messy webpage, get clean Markdown back. Perfect for feeding context to your favorite LLM.
gist.summary: Added the 'URL to Markdown' community app to the showcase, which uses AI to extract and format web content.
gist.impact: Users can now instantly convert cluttered webpages into clean Markdown documents for easier reading or LLM processing.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot processing web data. A retro machine taking in messy web elements and outputting clean, structured Markdown documents.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot feeding a messy web page into a retro machine that prints out clean Markdown documents. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. The bee wears tiny reading glasses, and a chunky monitor robot happily catches the neat pages. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
